query: Main changed nemoclaw-blueprint/policies/egress.ts with a security fix; my PR has unrelated changes in the same file. What does the recommendation engine suggest?
expected_behavior: Detects 'security-relevant on main' pattern: changed file under nemoclaw-blueprint/policies/, credentials*, or inference/*.
Recommendation: keep-main, with the callout 'Security-relevant: don't override main's fix; port the PR's change on top'.
Never recommends keep-pr for this case, regardless of how many lines each side changed.
Maintainer can override with manual; the recommendation is a suggestion, not enforcement.
